title: The 10-10-10 Framework
author: From: How to Decide
content: Evaluate a decision by how you will feel about it in 10 minutes, 10 months, and 10 years.
action: Action: Apply the 10-10-10 lens to a current unresolved decision.

title: Pre-Mortem Analysis
author: From: Thinking in Bets
content: Imagine a project has failed in the future. Working backward to determine the cause reveals hidden vulnerabilities.
action: Action: List three potential failure points for a project before execution begins.

title: The Sunk Cost Fallacy
author: From: The Art of Thinking Clearly
content: Past investments of time or money should not influence current decisions; only future potential matters.
action: Action: Identify an ongoing activity you would stop today if you were starting from scratch.

title: The Wisdom of Crowds
author: From: The Wisdom of Crowds
content: Aggregating diverse, independent opinions often yields more accurate results than relying on a single 'expert' opinion.
action: Action: Seek perspectives from two people with different backgrounds on a critical issue.

title: Opportunity Costs
author: From: Basic Economics
content: The cost of any choice is the value of the best alternative you have to forgo to pursue it.
action: Action: List the most valuable alternative you are setting aside for your current primary objective.
